mentions.text:
I added $WWR ($170m MC) and $DFLI ($110.25M MC) today. 

For full transparency, I have no clue about their fundamentals 

Reason I bought?

Today: "China expands rare earths restrictions, targets chip users"

WWR does Graphite for batteries.
DFLI does Lithium for batteries.

reasons: China imposes export control on graphite and lithium batteries
no export from China means American-made graphite stocks go up
mentions.text:
@EccShibaInuInv Depends on the news source but other headlines were "BREAKING: China imposes export control on graphite and lithium batteries."

No export from China = American made Graphite/Lithium battery stocks go up.
